title: RACC Test Prep — F&A Costs Chapter (PDF)
display_label: RACC F&A Costs Test Prep Chapter (PDF)
content: ORA-prepared RACC test prep chapter on Facilities and Administrative (F&A) costs, also known as indirect costs. Self-contained study packet with background information, test questions, and answers. Aligned to RACC CRA/CPRA/CFRA exam blueprints.
